ul.class: navbar-nav hidden absolute left-0 right-0 lg:static lg:flex items-center lg:w-auto lg:space-x-3 lg:pb-0

border border-border/10 lg:border-none mt-2 lg:mt-0 bg-text-dark p-8 mb-2 lg:mb-0 lg:transition-[opacity_transform] lg:duration-500 lg:absolute lg:right-0 lg:invisible lg:group-hover:visible lg:opacity-0 lg:group-hover:opacity-100 lg:scale-95 lg:group-hover:scale-100 lg:group-hover:grid lg:grid lg:grid-cols-3 lg:gap-x-8 min-w-max nav-dropdown-list

div.class: flex flex-col items-center lg:col-8 mx-auto gap-10 mt-8

div.p:
The page you are looking for might have been removed.
Please check the URL and try again.

a.class: group/arrowBtn flex items-center max-w-max gap-x-2 btn btn-primary py-4

div.class: relative w-5 h-5 grid place-items-center overflow-hidden

i.class: group-hover/arrowBtn:translate-x-full transition-transform duration-500 ease-out w-5 h-5 grid place-items-center
absolute top-0 right-full group-hover/arrowBtn:translate-x-full transition-transform duration-500 ease-out w-5 h-5 grid place-items-center

div.class: mt-6 bg-primary text-white rounded-3xl p-10 lg:p-16

div.h2: Grow Your Team, Grow Your Business
div.p: Streamline HR processes and empower your team with our products. Facilitate manage employee data, and more in one platform.

a.class: group/arrowBtn flex items-center max-w-max gap-x-2 btn btn-primary py-4 bg-white hover:bg-white/80 text-text-dark mt-9

div.class: relative w-5 h-5 grid place-items-center overflow-hidden

i.class: group-hover/arrowBtn:translate-x-full transition-transform duration-500 ease-out w-5 h-5 grid place-items-center
absolute top-0 right-full group-hover/arrowBtn:translate-x-full transition-transform duration-500 ease-out w-5 h-5 grid place-items-center

div.p:
Start building your insights hub with
lightweight analysis.
